error_signature: get video call returns an empty set
title: YouTube video removal causes workflow failure
symptom: The workflow fails to insert data into MongoDB due to a missing YouTube video, resulting in an empty set being returned.
applies_when: Using YouTube node to collect videos
Subsequent workflow processes the collected videos
not_this_if: All videos are present and processed correctly
root_cause: When a YouTube video is removed after being collected, the subsequent workflow that attempts to access this video fails, leading to an empty response. This causes the workflow to halt as it continuously tries to process the missing video.
fix_steps: Add an IF block in the workflow to check if the video exists before processing
Configure the IF block to skip any videos that cannot be found on YouTube
Save the workflow and run it again
agent_instruction: Implement an IF block to skip missing YouTube videos in the workflow.
